subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abha! When thou beholdest the realities of all things, thou shalt see them as manifestations of the Names and Attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی چون در حقائق اشیا نگری جمیع را از تجلیات اسماء و صفات
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @intelligible vs. perceptible realities
